name: bat
description: A cat(1) clone with syntax highlighting and Git integration

name: -A
--show-all
options.description: Show non-printable characters

name: -p
--plain
options.description: Show plain style, no decorations

name: -l
--language
options.description: Explicitly set the language for syntax highlighting

name: -H
--highlight-line
options.description: Highlight the specified line ranges

options.name: --file-name
options.description: Specify the name to display for a file. Useful when piping data to bat from STDIN when bat does not otherwise know the filename

name: -d
--diff
options.description: Show lines that have been added/removed/modified with respect to the Git index

options.name: --diff-context
options.description: Include N lines of context around added/removed/modified lines when using '--diff'

options.name: --tabs
options.description: Set the tab width to T spaces. Use a width of 0 to pass tabs through directly

options.name: --wrap
options.description: Specify when to use colored output

options.name: --terminal-width
options.description: Explicitly set the width of the terminal instead of determining it automatically

name: -n
--number
options.description: Show line numbers, no other decorations

options.name: --color
options.description: Specify when to use colored output

options.name: --italic-text
options.description: Specify when to use ANSI sequences for italic text in the output

options.name: --decorations
options.description: Specify when to use the decorations that have been specified via '--style'

name: -f
--force-colorization
options.description: Alias for '--decorations=always --color=always'

options.name: --paging
options.description: Specify when to use the pager

options.name: --pager
options.description: Determine which pager is used

name: -m
--map-syntax
options.description: Map a glob pattern to an existing syntax name

args.name: <glob:syntax>
args.description: Full path or the filename:language that highlighted

options.name: --ignored-suffix
options.description: Ignore extension

options.name: --theme
options.description: Set the theme for syntax highlighting

options.name: --list-themes
options.description: Display a list of supported themes for syntax highlighting

options.name: --style
options.description: Display a list of supported themes for syntax highlighting

name: -r
--line-range
options.description: Only print the specified range of lines for each file

name: -L
--list-languages
options.description: Display a list of supported languages for syntax highlighting

name: -u
--unbuffered
options.description: Make output unbuffered (exists for POSIX-compliance reasons and is simply ignored)

options.name: --diagnostic
options.description: Show diagnostic information for bug reports

options.name: --acknowledgements
options.description: Show acknowledgements

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print help message

name: -V
--version
options.description: Show version information
